title: colymbada scopulorum
intro: Colymbada scopulorum, also known as Mountain Rock Cress, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and alleviating symptoms of coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of Colymbada scopulorum often include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
